summary: Gift Card API Integration feature testing complete. All 21 backend API tests pass. Frontend admin panel and user purchase flow with activation code display verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: Console errors 'Dashboard fetch error: Error: Errore di rete' appearing during page load - intermittent network errors, possibly related to concurrent API calls

issues: React Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility issue in Radix UI dialogs

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: Backend gift card API implementation is solid: admin CRUD, API config, API testing, purchase with brand API call all work correctly
Frontend admin panel correctly shows API badge, expandable API config section with all fields (endpoint, key, method, headers, body template)
Purchase flow correctly displays activation code from brand API response
Brand API integration uses httpbin.org/post for testing which correctly returns the sent payload
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed gift cards created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gift card API integration feature fully tested: 1) Admin can create gift cards via POST /api/giftcards/admin/create, 2) Admin can configure brand API via PUT /api/giftcards/admin/{id}/api-config, 3) Admin can test API via POST /api/giftcards/admin/{id}/test-api, 4) GET /api/giftcards/admin/all returns cards with api_configured boolean, 5) POST /api/giftcards/purchase returns activation_code from brand API, 6) Frontend admin page shows Aggiungi button, API config section with endpoint/key/method/headers/body inputs, Test button, green API badge, 7) Frontend purchase shows activation code display with copy button. All using httpbin.org/post as MOCK brand API for testing.

verified_features.POST /api/giftcards/admin/create: PASS - Creates new gift card with brand, category, cashback, amounts
verified_features.PUT /api/giftcards/admin/{id}/api-config: PASS - Configures API endpoint, key, method, headers, body template
verified_features.POST /api/giftcards/admin/{id}/test-api: PASS - Tests brand API and returns status, activation_code, raw_response
verified_features.GET /api/giftcards/admin/all: PASS - Returns all cards with api_configured boolean field
verified_features.POST /api/giftcards/purchase: PASS - Returns activation_code, api_response, api_status from brand API call
verified_features.POST /api/giftcards/link-card: PASS - Links credit card for payment
verified_features.Frontend Admin Page: PASS - Shows Aggiungi button, card list with API badge, API config toggle
verified_features.Frontend API Config Section: PASS - Shows endpoint, key, method, headers, body inputs with Save and Test buttons
verified_features.Frontend Purchase Result: PASS - Shows activation code with copy button after purchase

mocked_apis.description: Brand gift card activation API uses httpbin.org/post for testing
mocked_apis.note: In production, real brand APIs will be configured with actual endpoints and keys
